title: Perche Pensa? Pensando S'invecchia
content:
To spend uncounted years of pain,
    Again, again, and yet again,
    In working out in heart and brain
    The problem of our being here;
    To gather facts from far and near,
    Upon the mind to hold them clear,
    And, knowing more may yet appear,
    Unto one�s latest breath to fear
    The premature result to draw�
    Is this the object, end and law,
    And purpose of our being here?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Arthur Hugh Clough delivers a powerful performance in "Perche Pensa? Pensando S'invecchia"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
